resources.name: getHashAnchor
resources.description: Anchor any 32-byte hash to Base mainnet (EIP-1559 calldata) and Solana mainnet (Memo program) in a single $0.005 USDC call. Returns both tx hashes plus block-explorer URLs as cryptographic proof a specific value existed at a known time.

note.description: Optional 200-char label echoed in the response (NOT written on-chain).

resources.name: getSanctionsScreen
resources.description: Sanctions + AML screening for any EVM or Solana wallet. Returns sanctions match boolean, specific OFAC SDN programs flagged (Tornado Cash, Lazarus, Hydra, Garantex, Blender.io etc.), inferred chain, and a low/medium/high risk verdict.

wallet.description: EVM (0x...) or Solana base58 address to screen against OFAC SDN sanctions lists.

resources.name: getDecisionAttest
resources.description: Verify a wallet signature over (input_hash, output_hash, decision) with domain separation, then dual-chain anchor the Merkle root on Base + Solana mainnet. Returns verified signer plus on-chain proof URLs. Schemes: EVM personal_sign or Solana Ed25519.

signer_pubkey.description: Required for ed25519; optional for eip191 (auto-recovered).

resources.name: getTxDecode
resources.description: Structured decode of any Base or Ethereum mainnet transaction. Returns block number, timestamp, status, gas, decoded transfers and method signatures.

resources.name: getNameResolve
resources.description: Cross-chain name resolution for ENS (Ethereum) and Bonfida SNS (Solana). Returns one or more addresses with chain context - useful for resolving human-readable names to wallet addresses before payments, lookups, or intel queries.

name.description: ENS or SNS name (e.g. vitalik.eth, bonfida.sol).

resources.name: getTokenPrice
resources.description: Fetch the current USD price for any major token by symbol (BTC, ETH, SOL, USDC...). Returns USD price, 24h change %, market cap, source, cache age.

resources.name: getCalldataDecode
resources.description: Decode raw EVM calldata into a function name, canonical signature, and typed parameter values. Resolves the 4-byte selector against openchain.xyz; ABI-decodes args. Returns ambiguity candidates on selector collision.

resources.name: getDatetimeParse
resources.description: Parse freeform datetime strings (e.g. 'tomorrow at noon', '2026-05-08T15:30Z', 'in 2 hours') into ISO 8601, unix epoch, broken-out components, signed relative-seconds delta, human relative phrase, and a confidence label.

resources.name: getWalletIntel
resources.description: One call returns a unified intel bundle for any EVM or Solana wallet - native balances on Base + Ethereum, USDC balances, tx count, has-history flag, reverse ENS/SNS, and sanctions verdict. Fetched in parallel; replaces 8-10 separate RPC + API hits.
